g.text: Robotics & AI Engineer • B.E. DSCE Bengaluru
Intern @ ATI Motors - New Product Initiative (NPI)
[ ONLINE ] Currently interning at ATI Motors as New Product Initiative (NPI) engineer •
Parallel: building autonomous mobile manipulator with ROS2 (sim -> real-world deployment)
Vision-based robotic arm control mapping hand landmarks to robot
ROS2 leader-follower system with real-time pose sharing and
IMU-based wheelchair controller using real-time hand tilt gestures
Autonomous nav + manipulation - ROS2 localization, planning &
